channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former US Young Activist Relocates to Middle East and Adopts Radical Views
item.description: Calla Walsh, once celebrated as a rising political star in the United States, has experienced a dramatic shift in her activism. At just 16, Walsh gained attention for her role in Senator Ed Markey’s 2...

item.title: Gas Cylinder Explosion Injures One Person in Lagos Shop
item.description: One gbege happen for Adeleye Street, Doyin area, Orile-Iganmu, Lagos State on Tuesday as one gas explosion occur for one shop. According to reports, the wahala start when one gas attendant dey refill ...

item.title: How a Soldier’s Ration Inspired the Iconic ‘Badluram ka Badan’ Marching Song
item.description: The Battle of Kohima, fought between April and June 1944, was a pivotal engagement of the Second World War in northeastern India. Around 15,000 Japanese troops surrounded a much smaller British-Indian...

item.title: Lauren Jackson joins WNBL head office to help grow the league
item.description: Lauren Jackson, widely regarded as the greatest player in WNBL history, has returned to the league in a strategic off-court role. The Canberra Capitals legend, who won seven championships and four MVP...

item.title: Arsenal Reach Champions League Final After 2-1 Aggregate Win Over Atletico Madrid
item.description: Arsenal don secure dem place for UEFA Champions League final after dem beat Atlético Madrid 1-0 for Tuesday night game, sealing 2-1 aggregate win at the Emirates Stadium. Na Bukayo Saka first-half goa...

item.title: Mona’s unwavering support for Stella in 'The Alibi': 10 memorable moments

item.title: Lee Najjar's life, wealth, and family legacy
item.description: Lee Najjar was a well-known American real estate developer, mostly remembered for his high-end properties in Atlanta and his link to reality TV star Kim Zolciak. Born in Puerto Rico, Najjar built a ma...

item.title: The Academy Requires Human Performances and Writing for Oscar Eligibility
item.description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has updated its eligibility rules for the Oscars, specifying that only human-performed acting and human-authored writing can be considered for nominatio...

item.title: HONOR 600 Lite: Key Features and Benefits for Everyday Use

item.title: Nigerian Senate sets eight-year requirement for contesting presiding officer positions
item.description: The Nigerian Senate don approve new changes to its internal rules, wey go affect who fit contest for top leadership positions like Senate President and Deputy Senate President. Under the new arrangeme...

item.title: GWS Giants explore potential club name change
item.description: The GWS Giants, an AFL club based in Sydney, are reportedly exploring the possibility of changing their club name. While no official announcement has been made, sources suggest that the club is consid...

item.title: Woman Honors Late Mother by Renovating Her Grave with Son Present
item.description: Loloh Smile recently fulfilled a vow she made to her late mother by rebuilding and tiling her grave, an emotional moment she shared on social media. Her mother had passed away when Loloh was still you...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi urges Congress leaders to focus on democracy after TMC defeat in Bengal
item.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi has urged his party members and others to refrain from celebrating the defeat of the Trinamool Congress (TMC) in the West Bengal Assembly elections. He emphasised that the...

item.title: ABS-CBN’s Vertical Drama “The Chambermaid’s Daughter” Achieves 5 Million Facebook Views and Tops iWant Charts
item.description: ABS-CBN’s latest vertical drama, “The Chambermaid’s Daughter,” has made a significant impact online, topping the charts on iWant and reaching over 5 million views on Facebook. Starring rising stars Al...

item.title: Italian Dubbing Choices for The Devil Wears Prada 2 Draw Criticism
item.description: The article examines a debate in Italy over the dubbed version of The Devil Wears Prada 2, focusing on the return of the original Italian voice cast from the first film. Fans recognized familiar voice...

item.title: La Vita Spa offers luxury Mother’s Day pamper experience giveaway
item.description: A promotional feature highlights a Mother’s Day campaign run by POST in partnership with La Vita Spa, offering one lucky winner a full-day spa experience valued at R3,999. La Vita Spa & Hair Studios o...

item.title: Vijay Reacts to TVK's Accurate Prediction of Tamil Nadu Election Outcome
item.description: The news article discusses actor Vijay's reaction to TVK's prediction regarding the Tamil Nadu state elections. TVK, a popular media outlet, had forecasted the election results with remarkable accurac...
